channel.title: OpenText (formerly Micro Focus) — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by OpenText (formerly Micro Focus) (opentext).

item.title: CVE-2025-15610 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: The .NET Remoting framework used by OpenText Fax (RightFax) includes known security vulnerabilities that could be exploited if the service is exposed in environments where the remoting ports are accessible.

item.title: CVE-2026-2123 · 8.6 HIGH — Privilege escalation vulnerability in Operations Agent
item.description: A security audit identified a privilege escalation vulnerability in Operations Agent(<=OA 12.29) on Windows. Under specific conditions Operations Agent may run executables from specific writeable locations.Thanks to Manuel Rickli & Philippe Leiser of…

item.title: CVE-2024-11604 · 7.3 HIGH — Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File
item.description: Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File vulnerability in the SCIM Driver module in OpenText IDM Driver and Extensions on Windows, Linux, 64 bit allows authenticated local users to obtain sensitive information via access to log files. This is…

item.title: CVE-2025-13478 · 8.4 HIGH — Cache Misconfiguration Leading to Cross-User Data Exposure
item.description: Cache misconfiguration vulnerability in OpenText Identity Manager on Windows, Linux allows remote authenticated users to obtain another user's session data via insecure application cache handling. This issue affects Identity Manager: 25.2(v4.10.1).

item.title: CVE-2026-3278 · 7.4 HIGH — XSS Vulnerability discovered in OpenText™ ZENworks Service Desk.
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in OpenText™ ZENworks Service Desk allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). The vulnerability could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary JavaScript leading…

item.title: CVE-2025-12453 · 5.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Improper neutralization of input during web page generation vulnerability has been discovered in OpenText™ Vertica.
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in OpenText™ Vertica allows Reflected XSS. The vulnerability could lead to Reflected XSS attack of cross-site scripting in Vertica management console a…

item.title: CVE-2025-12454 · 5.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Improper neutralization of input during web page generation vulnerability has been discovered in OpenText™ Vertica.
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in OpenText™ Vertica allows Reflected XSS. The vulnerability could lead to Reflected XSS attack of cross-site scripting in Vertica management console a…

item.title: CVE-2025-12455 · 5.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Username Enumeration Observable Response Discrepancy vulnerability has been discovered in OpenText™ Vertica.
item.description: Observable response discrepancy vulnerability in OpenText™ Vertica allows Password Brute Forcing. The vulnerability could lead to Password Brute Forcing in Vertica management console application.This issue affects Vertica: from 10.0 through 10.X, fro…

item.title: CVE-2026-3266 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Improper access control vulnerability has been discovered in OpenText™ Filr.
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in OpenText™ Filr allows Authentication Bypass. The vulnerability could allow unauthenticated users to get XSRF token and do RPC with carefully crafted programs. This issue affects Filr: through 25.1.2.

item.title: CVE-2025-9120 · 8.6 HIGH — RCE vulnerability has been discovered in OpenText™ Carbonite Safe Server Backup.
item.description: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') vulnerability in OpenText™ Carbonite Safe Server Backup allows Code Injection. The vulnerability could be exploited through an open port, potentially allowing unauthorized access. This issue a…

item.title: CVE-2026-1658 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Content spoofing vulnerability discovered in OpenText™ Directory Services
item.description: User Interface (UI) Misrepresentation of Critical Information vulnerability in OpenText™ Directory Services allows Cache Poisoning. The vulnerability could be exploited by a bad actor to inject manipulated text into the OpenText application, potentia…

item.title: CVE-2025-9208 · 7.5 HIGH — Stored-XSS vulnerability discovered in OpenText WSM Management Server.
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in OpenText™ Web Site Management Server allows Stored XSS. The vulnerability could execute malicious scripts on the client side when the downloa…

item.title: CVE-2025-13671 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Cross Site request forgery vulnerability discovered in OpenText WSM Management Server.
item.description: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in OpenText™ Web Site Management Server allows Cross Site Request Forgery. The vulnerability could make a user, with active session inside the product, click on a page that contains this malicious HTML…

item.title: CVE-2025-13672 · 7 HIGH — Reflected Cross-Site Scripting discovered in OpenText WSM Management Server.
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in OpenText™ Web Site Management Server allows Reflected XSS. The vulnerability could allow injecting malicious JavaScript inside URL parameters…

item.title: CVE-2025-8054 · 7.1 HIGH — Path Traversal vulnerability have been discovered in OpenText™ XM Fax.
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability in OpenText™ XM Fax allows Path Traversal. The vulnerability could allow an attacker to arbitrarily disclose content of files on the local filesystem. This i…

item.title: CVE-2025-8055 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — SSRF vulnerability have been discovered in OpenText™ XM Fax
item.description: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in OpenText™ XM Fax allows Server Side Request Forgery. The vulnerability could allow an attacker to perform blind SSRF to other systems accessible from the XM Fax server. This issue affects XM Fax: 24…

item.title: CVE-2025-15579 · 9.5 CRITICAL 🌩️ — An Insecure Deserialization vulnerability has been discovered in OpenText™ Directory Services.
item.description: Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability in OpenText™ Directory Services allows Object Injection. The vulnerability could lead to remote code execution, denial of service, or privilege escalation. This issue affects Directory Services: before…

item.title: CVE-2024-9432 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information vulnerability has been discovered in OpenText™ Vertica.
item.description: Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information vulnerability in OpenText™ Vertica allows Retrieve Embedded Sensitive Data. The vulnerability could read Vertica agent plaintext apikey.This issue affects Vertica versions: 23.X, 24.X, 25.X.

item.title: CVE-2025-11884 · 2.3 LOW — Cross-site Scripting vulnerability discovered in OpenText™ Universal Discovery and CMDB
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in opentext uCMDB allows Stored XSS. The vulnerability could allow an attacker has high level access to UCMDB to create or update data with mali…

item.title: CVE-2025-8050 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — External Control of File vulnerability has been discovered in opentext Flipper.
item.description: External Control of File Name or Path vulnerability in opentext Flipper allows Path Traversal. The vulnerability could allow a user to access files hosted on the server. This issue affects Flipper: 3.1.2.

item.title: CVE-2025-8052 · 1 LOW — HQL Injection vulnerability has been discovered in Opentext Flipper.
item.description: SQL Injection vulnerability in opentext Flipper allows SQL Injection. The vulnerability could allow a low privilege user to interact with the database in unintended ways and extract data by interacting with the HQL processor. This issue affects Flipp…

item.title: CVE-2025-8048 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — External Control of File path vulnerability has been discovered on Openext Flipper.
item.description: External Control of File Name or Path vulnerability in opentext Flipper allows Path Traversal. The vulnerability could allow a user to submit a stored local file path and then download the specified file from the system by requesting the stored docum…

item.title: CVE-2025-8049 · 2.3 LOW 🌩️ — Insufficient Access Control vulnerability has been discovered in OpenText Flipper.
item.description: Insufficient Granularity of Access Control vulnerability in opentext Flipper allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. The vulnerability could allow a low-privilege user to elevate privileges within the application. Thi…

item.title: CVE-2025-8051 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Path traversal validation vulnerability has been discovered in opentext Flipper.
item.description: Path Traversal vulnerability in opentext Flipper allows Absolute Path Traversal. The vulnerability could allow a user to access files hosted on the server. This issue affects Flipper: 3.1.2.

item.title: CVE-2025-8053 · 1 LOW — Insufficient access control vulnerability has been discovered in Opentext Flipper.
item.description: Insufficient Granularity of Access Control vulnerability in opentext Flipper allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. The vulnerability could allow a low privilege user to interact with the backend API without sufficie…

item.title: CVE-2025-8716 · 5.8 MEDIUM — Cache exploitation vulnerability
item.description: In Content Management versions 20.4- 25.3 authenticated attackers may exploit a complex cache poisoning technique to download unprotected files from the server if the filenames are known.

item.title: CVE-2025-5808 · 7.3 HIGH — Authentication Bypass vulnerability discovered in the OpenText™ Self-Service Password Reset
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in OpenText Self Service Password Reset allows Authentication Bypass.This issue affects Self Service Password Reset from before 4.8 patch 3.

item.title: CVE-2025-3478 · 8.5 HIGH — OpenText Enterprise Security Manager Stored XSS
item.description: A Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability has been identified in OpenText Enterprise Security Manager. The vulnerability could be remotely exploited.

item.title: CVE-2025-8997 · 5.7 MEDIUM — OpenText Enterprise Security Manager Information Exposure
item.description: An Information Exposure vulnerability has been identified in OpenText Enterprise Security Manager. The vulnerability could be remotely exploited.

item.title: CVE-2025-8616 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Malicious browser plugins may cause Authentication replay attack vulnerability to bypass authentication in OpenText Advanced Authentication
item.description: A weakness identified in OpenText Advanced Authentication where a Malicious browser plugin can record and replay the user authentication process to bypass Authentication. This issue affects Advanced Authentication on or before 6.5.0.

item.title: CVE-2024-7650 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Remote code execution vulnerability discovered in OpenText™ Directory Services CE 23.4
item.description: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') vulnerability in OpenText™ Directory Services allows Remote Code Inclusion. The vulnerability could allow access to the system via script injection.This issue affects Directory Services: 23.4.

item.title: CVE-2025-0885 · 1.8 LOW — Incorrect Authorization vulnerability affects OpenText™ GroupWise
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in OpenText™ GroupWise allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. The vulnerability could allow unauthorized access to calendar items marked private. This issue affects GroupWise ver…

item.title: CVE-2025-2236 · 2.1 LOW — Exposure of Sensitive System Information vulnerability during configuration affecting OpenText Advanced Authentication.
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive System Information to an Unauthorized Control Sphere vulnerability in OpenText Advanced Authentication allows Information Elicitation. The vulnerability could reveal sensitive information while managing and configuring of the ex…

item.title: CVE-2024-10865 · 9.4 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Reflected Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability in OpenText Advanced Authentication
item.description: Improper Input validation leads to XSS or Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in OpenText Advanced Authentication. This issue affects Advanced Authentication versions before 6.5.

item.title: CVE-2024-10864 · 7.5 HIGH — SQL Injection vulnerability has been discovered in OpenText™ Advanced Authentication.
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in OpenText Advanced Authentication. This issue affects Advanced Authentication versions before 6.5

item.title: CVE-2025-3272 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Incorrect user authorization vulnerability has been identified in Open Text Operations Bridge Manager.
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in OpenText™ Operations Bridge Manager. The vulnerability could allow authenticated users to change their password without providing their old password. This issue affects Operations Bridge Manager: 24.2, 24.4.

item.title: CVE-2025-3476 · 9.4 CRITICAL
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in OpenText™ Operations Bridge Manager. The vulnerability could allows privilege escalation by authenticated users.This issue affects Operations Bridge Manager: 2023.05, 23.4, 24.2, 24.4.

item.title: CVE-2024-12706 · 2.1 LOW — SQL Injection vulnerability discovered in OpenText™ Digital Asset Management.
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in OpenText™ Digital Asset Management. T he vulnerability could allow an authenticated user to run arbitrary SQL commands on the underlying database. T…

item.title: CVE-2024-12543 · 5.9 MEDIUM — A user enumeration and subsequent data integrity vulnerability affecting barcode functionality
item.description: User Enumeration and Data Integrity in Barcode functionality in OpenText Content Management versions 24.3-25.1on Windows and Linux allows a malicous authenticated attacker to potentially alter barcode attributes.

item.title: CVE-2024-12863 · 5.6 MEDIUM — Stored XSS in Discussions functionality
item.description: Stored XSS in Discussions in OpenText Content Management CE 20.2 to 25.1 on Windows and Linux allows authenticated malicious users to inject code into the system.

item.title: CVE-2025-2517 · 2.3 LOW 🌩️ — Reference to Expired Domain Vulnerability in OpenText™ ArcSight Enterprise Security Manager
item.description: Reference to Expired Domain Vulnerability in OpenText™ ArcSight Enterprise Security Manager.

item.title: CVE-2024-12862 · 5.5 MEDIUM — REST API allows users without permissions to remove external collaborators
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in the OpenText Content Server REST API on Windows, Linux allows users without the appropriate permissions to remove external collaborators.This issue affects Content Server: 20.2-24.4.

item.title: CVE-2024-12530 · 7 HIGH — Insecure Dynamic-Link Library (DLL) Load vulnerability
item.description: Uncontrolled Search Path Element vulnerability in OpenText Secure Content Manager on Windows allows DLL Side-Loading.This issue affects Secure Content Manager: 23.4. End-users can potentially exploit the vulnerability to execute malicious code in the…

item.title: CVE-2022-26323 · 8.7 HIGH — Incorrect Use of Privileged vulnerability has been discovered on OpenText™ UCMDB and Operation Bridge Manager product.
item.description: Incorrect Use of Privileged APIs vulnerability in OpenText™ Operations Bridge Manager, OpenText™ Operations Bridge Suite (Containerized), OpenText™ UCMDB ( Classic and Containerized) allows Privilege Escalation. The vulnerability could allow authenti…

item.title: CVE-2025-0883 · 2.1 LOW — vulnerability has been discovered in OpenText™ Service Manager.
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Script in an Error Message Web Page vulnerability in OpenText™ Service Manager. The vulnerability could reveal sensitive information retained by the browser. This issue affects Service Manager: 9.70, 9.71, 9.72, 9.80.

item.title: CVE-2025-0884 · 7.3 HIGH — Privilege Escalation vulnerability has been discovered in OpenText™ Service Manager.
item.description: Unquoted Search Path or Element vulnerability in OpenText™ Service Manager. The vulnerability could allow a user to gain SYSTEM privileges through Privilege Escalation. This issue affects Service Manager: 9.70, 9.71, 9.72.

item.title: CVE-2024-12799 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Insufficiently Protected Credentials
item.description: Insufficiently Protected Credentials vulnerability in OpenText Identity Manager Advanced Edition on Windows, Linux, 64 bit allows Privilege Abuse. This vulnerability could allow an authenticated user to obtain higher privileged user’s sensitive infor…

item.title: CVE-2024-8125 · 5.4 MEDIUM — A remote code vulnerability has been discovered in OpenText™ Content Management.
item.description: Improper Validation of Specified Type of Input vulnerability in OpenText™ Content Management (Extended ECM) allows Parameter Injection. A bad actor with the required OpenText Content Management privileges (not root) could expose the vulnerability to…

item.title: CVE-2024-7085 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Exposure of private information vulnerability has been discovered in OpenText™ Solutions Business Manager (SBM).
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in OpenText™ Solutions Business Manager (SBM) allows Stored XSS. The vulnerability could result in the exposure of private information to an una…

item.title: CVE-2024-12111 · 8 HIGH — Potential LDAP injection vulnerability in OpenText Privileged Access Manager
item.description: In a specific scenario a LDAP user can abuse the authentication process using injection attack in OpenText Privileged Access Manager that allows authentication bypass. This issue affects Privileged Access Manager version 23.3(4.4); 24.3(4.5)
